title: masdevallia × fraseri
intro: Masdevallia × fraseri is a hybrid orchid species, resulting from the cross between Masdevallia veitchiana and Masdevallia caudata. It is also known as the 'Fraser's Masdevallia' or 'Fraser's Hybrid', and is valued for its unique and delicate appearance. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its reported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. In herbal preparations, Masdevallia × fraseri is often used to make teas or infusions, which are believed to have health benefits such as reducing stress and promoting wound healing, although more research is needed to confirm these claims.
